facts: Researchers grew dolomite in the laboratory after two centuries of failed attempts.
The result removes one of the oldest experimental barriers around the mineral.
The work gives scientists a controlled way to study how dolomite forms.
A late snow returned after spring bloom had already started in several Belarusian towns.
Local gardeners reported damage to early blossoms.
Night temperatures dropped below zero for one cycle only.
